title: List OTC sale tiers for an allowlisted DAO
notes: Phase v0.5.0 — exercises dexe_otc_list_sales_for_dao against Glacier (BSC testnet). The TokenSaleProposal helper is wired but has zero tiers; expect tiers: [] and counts.active == 0. Mainnet variant pending: the orchestrator template engine doesn't have firstAllowlistedTokenSaleProposal, so the helper address is hard-coded to Glacier here.
